name: rerun-same-scenario
description: Re-check Run Test? on the same scenario. Expected: second Submission; Linked Submission points to newest; WAS stays unique; XP is one-per-Submission.
prerequisites: Prior live pass on same scenario row
prohibited_side_effects: Must not create second WAS for same Enrollment+Week
Must not duplicate Source Key on prior Submission
safe_rerun_behavior: 115 intentionally creates another Submission; downstream XP dedupe is per Submission RID
cleanup_instructions: Document extra Submissions; optional cleanup after verification
manual_requirements: Re-check Run Test? in Airtable UI or API patch

known_evidence.live_note: PROD already has 3 same-day Schmidt Submissions (all Count It) — see CURRENT-PROD-BASELINE
